description: Create, manage, or delete travel expenses
preflight: May need to activate travel expense module
endpoints: POST /travelExpense/cost — body: {travelExpense:{id}, date, costCategory:{id}, paymentType:{id}, amountCurrencyIncVat, currency:{id}, vatType:{id}, isPaidByEmployee:true}
common_errors: Travel expense module may need activation
Cost categories and payment types need to be looked up first
tips: Multi-step: create expense → add costs → deliver
